summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nova AI iteration 8 - Dashboard with sandboxed agent execution. Backend: 31/31 tests passed. Frontend: All dashboard features working correctly. Fixed critical security bug where blocked imports were not validated at agent creation time.
passed_tests: Dashboard stats requires authentication (401)
Dashboard stats returns agent_count, agent_limit, tier, total_runs, purchased_agents
Free tier users have agent_limit of 3
List user agents returns array
Create agent with valid code succeeds
Create agent with blocked import (os) is rejected at creation time
Create agent with blocked import (subprocess) is rejected
Create agent with blocked pattern (eval) is rejected
Create agent with blocked pattern (exec) is rejected
Create agent with blocked pattern (open) is rejected
Delete agent removes it from list
Run agent with valid input returns success with result and output
Agent can use safe imports (json, math, re, datetime, collections, random, hashlib, base64)
Agent receives INPUT dict with input_data
Agent receives ENV dict with env_vars
Agent print() output is captured in output field
Running disabled agent returns 400
POST /stop changes agent status to disabled
POST /start changes agent status to ready
Webhook trigger executes agent and returns result
Webhook trigger on disabled agent returns 400
Webhook trigger on manual-only agent returns 400
Invalid webhook key returns 404
GET /executions returns recent runs with trigger, success, duration, result
Free user can create up to 3 agents, 4th is rejected with 403
GET /dashboard/purchased returns list of transactions
Import sys is blocked at creation
Import socket is blocked at creation
getattr() pattern is blocked at creation
__import__ pattern is blocked at creation
__builtins__ pattern is blocked at creation
Frontend: Dashboard redirects to login when not authenticated
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats cards (Agents X/3, Total Runs, Purchased, Tier)
Frontend: Agent progress bar shows purple fill, turns red at limit
Frontend: Deploy Agent button opens modal with name, description, code, env vars, trigger fields
Frontend: Template buttons (Echo Bot, Data Cruncher, JSON Transformer) pre-fill form
Frontend: Run agent modal shows input textarea and displays result/output/error
Frontend: Successful execution shows green 'Success' with output and RESULT sections
Frontend: Toggle agent (disable/enable) changes status indicator
Frontend: Show/Hide code toggle expands to show agent source code
Frontend: Webhook URL displayed with copy button, toast on copy
Frontend: Upgrade banner shown when agent_count >= agent_limit
Frontend: Deploy Agent button disabled at limit
Frontend: Purchased tab shows empty state
Frontend: Dashboard link visible in navbar when logged in
Frontend: Mobile responsive on 390px viewport
Frontend: Dashboard link visible in mobile hamburger menu
seed_data_creation: Admin user has 2 agents: Echo Bot and Data Cruncher
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Dashboard + Sandbox features from iteration 8 are working. Fixed critical security bug: sandbox.py validate_code() now checks for blocked imports at creation time (not just runtime). The sandbox uses RestrictedPython v8.1 with _print_ factory for print capture. AGENT_TIER_LIMITS are hardcoded as free:3, pro:999999. Admin user currently has 2 agents deployed.

bug_fixes_applied.issue: Blocked imports (os, sys, subprocess, etc.) were not validated at agent creation time - only at runtime
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added import validation to validate_code() function using regex pattern matching for 'import X' and 'from X' statements

mocked_apis.Studio Vibe Mode AI chat: Uses local generateAssistantResponse function (pattern matcher, not real LLM)
mocked_apis.Upgrade to Pro button: UI only - no actual upgrade flow implemented
